cwsTroubleshooting.label: Chrome Web Store: Troubleshooting violations
cwsTroubleshooting.note: Explains how Chrome Web Store rejection and violation references should be interpreted and fixed.

cwsPrepare.label: Chrome Web Store: Prepare your extension
cwsPrepare.note: States that the Chrome Web Store upload ZIP should contain manifest.json at the root, not nested inside a folder.

remoteHostedCode.label: Chrome Extensions: Deal with remote hosted code violations
remoteHostedCode.note: Defines remotely hosted code as browser-executed JS/WASM loaded outside the extension package and recommends scanning compiled submission output for http/https references.

programPolicies.label: Chrome Web Store Developer Program Policies
programPolicies.note: Sets the broader user trust, transparency, and user data handling policy baseline for Chrome Web Store items.

cwsPrivacy.label: Chrome Web Store: Fill out the privacy fields
cwsPrivacy.note: Explains the Developer Dashboard privacy practices tab, single purpose, and permission justification fields.

cwsUpdate.label: Chrome Web Store: Update your item
cwsUpdate.note: Explains that changing code or package assets requires uploading a new ZIP and incrementing the extension version.

mv3Csp.label: Chrome Extensions: Manifest content security policy
mv3Csp.note: Documents extension_pages and sandbox CSP policies, default policies, and MV3 minimum CSP restrictions.

mv3Sandbox.label: Chrome Extensions: Manifest sandbox
mv3Sandbox.note: Documents sandbox.pages and the sandbox CSP requirements, including the sandbox directive and allow-same-origin restriction.

permissionPolicies.label: Chrome Web Store: Permissions policy
permissionPolicies.note: Describes using only the narrowest permissions required for the extension's current functionality.

declarePermissions.label: Chrome Extensions: Declare permissions
declarePermissions.note: Explains permission declarations, optional permissions, and permission warning implications.

permissionWarnings.label: Chrome Extensions: Permission warning guidelines
permissionWarnings.note: Explains that some extension permissions trigger install-time or runtime warnings.

activeTab.label: Chrome Extensions: activeTab permission
activeTab.note: Documents activeTab as temporary user-invoked access that can sometimes replace broad host access.

chrome_web_store_rejection_checker.label: Chrome Web Store rejection checker workflow
